rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assign statements in implementation scope only for output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Component type contracts should use assumptions and guarantees with visible inputs/outputs
Implementation contracts may include assignments for subcomponent bindings
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use assume/guarantee/equation/constant syntax within annex agree {** ... **} structure
Component type scopes are for assumptions/guarantees; implementation scopes are for assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Implementation-level subcomponent paths in type contracts
